official_functions.role: Construct the official Play clientbound set_held_slot fixture
Write, decode, and observe the official held slot body
Name the packet id assigned in Play clientbound state

invariants: The official Play clientbound table assigns set_held_slot to packet id 0x69.
The official Play clientbound protocol codec dispatches the set_held_slot id to ClientboundSetHeldSlotPacket.
The official set_held_slot body is one VarInt slot.
The fixture uses a primitive slot only and does not require initialized inventory state.

The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, decoded slot, Play clientbound packet table, and remaining decode byte counts are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
This contract does not prove inventory contents, UI behavior, or client-load completion.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer inventory contents, UI behavior, or client-load completion.
